import React from 'react'; const AboutPage = () => { return (

About FixNFit Co.

FixNFit Co. is your trusted source for premium air cooler spare parts. We specialize in providing high-quality replacement parts for all major air cooler brands.

With over 5 years of experience in the industry, we understand the importance of keeping your cooling systems running efficiently. Our extensive catalog includes cooling pads, water pumps, motors, fans, and more.

Why Choose Us?

  • ✓ Genuine spare parts
  • ✓ Fast delivery across India
  • ✓ Competitive prices
  • ✓ Expert customer support
  • ✓ Easy returns and exchanges
); }; export default AboutPage;
